articles.title: DOT Reaches New All-Time High as Polkadot Braces for Multiple Project Launches in 2021
articles.description: Polkadot has witnessed a massive surge in price by almost +37.9% in the last 24 hours, driving the market cap to $10 billion, bringing it to a new all-time high at $12.74. And for the first time, DOT became the 5th biggest cryptocurrency in market cap. DOT Price Soars Record-High Polkadot is viewed as aRead More

articles.title: Paxos adopts Chainlink oracles to further adoption of PAX and PAXG tokens
articles.description: Paxos, a crypto brokerage and infrastructure platform, today announced it is now working with Chainlink to leverage its market-leading decentralized oracle network. This will boost the adoption of the USD-backed stablecoin Paxos Standard (PAX) and the gold-backed token PAX Gold (PAXG) within the Decentralized Finance (DeFi) ecosystem—a parallel financial system built on the blockchain which...

articles.title: Polkadot Price Analysis: DOT Surges 40% to a New ATH, Becoming the 5th Largest Cryptocurrency
articles.description: Polkadot saw a superb 38% price explosion over the past 24 hours as the coin hits $12.70. Against Bitcoin, DOT rebounded from support at 21,100 SAT this week and is now above 33,400 SAT.

articles.title: Stellar blockchain selected by German real estate group to issue $24 million bond
articles.description: The Stellar blockchain has been the go-to blockchain for the European real estate group – Vanovia for issuing a €20 million [$24 million] bond. According to the announcement, this three-year bond will be deployed using Stellar blockchain to issue security tokens for the transfer of real estate rights. Vonovia made use of an online marketplace […]

articles.title: German real estate group issues $24M bond using Stellar blockchain
articles.description: Major German real estate group Vonovia has used the Stellar blockchain to transfer the ownership of real estate rights.

articles.title: DeFi DEX Loopring Launches L2-to-L1 Gas Free Transfers
articles.description: Anyone that has used Ethereum this month will have felt the financial pain of high gas fees. Naturally, this won’t bother the whales, but it makes participating in DeFi economically unviable for the majority of average users. Loopring, which launched its latest AMM in early December, is addressing these problems with the adoption and promotion … Continued

articles.title: Polkadot Price Hits Record High, Pushing Market Cap Past $10 Billion
articles.description: Polkadot is now the fifth-largest cryptocurrency by market cap. And it's hot on XRP's heels.

articles.title: Grayscale Investments liquidates all of its XRP... while it still can
articles.description: Grayscale is dissolving its XRP Trust and will distribute cash to investors after liquidating all XRP held by the trust.
